code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  mut k = i
  let n = string.len(s)
  while k < n
    match string.byte_at(s, k)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        k = k + 1
      else
        return k
      end
    when None
      return k
    end
  end
  k
end

fn read_int(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> (Int, Int)
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut sign = 1
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b == 43
      i = i + 1
    else
      i = i
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  mut value = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
        i = i + 1
      else
        return (sign * value, i)
      end
    when None
      return (sign * value, i)
    end
  end
  (sign * value, i)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let i0 = skip_ws(input, 0)
  let r1 = read_int(input, i0)
  match r1
  when (a, j)
    let i1 = skip_ws(input, j)
    let r2 = read_int(input, i1)
    match r2
    when (b, _)
      let result = a * a + b * b
      println("r=#{result}")
    end
  end
end
